steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The strongest clue is “so that audiences can continue to view them well into the future.” This phrase reveals the museum's goal: enabling future access to the photographs.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: The target meaning is “maintaining photographs in good condition for future viewing.” “Preserving” directly captures this—it means keeping something protected and intact over time. The other three either reverse the goal (replacing removes the originals), describe something impossible (inventing photos that already exist), or address quantity rather than care (counting). That matches choice C — C is correct.
